title: SWAT-droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''SWAT-droid''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] utilized by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Tactical and Operational]] units during the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

They were proposed to be used in the raid on [[Lumiya]]'s apartment on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], but [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had deemed them too conspicuous to warrant their usage.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
